title: Sibella’s legacy: Karoo cheetah pioneer inspires global conservation
description: EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Samara Karoo Game...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Samara Karoo Game Reserve in the Eastern Cape is situated 55 km outside the charming and historic Graaff-Reinet, the fourth oldest town in South Africa.","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Samara Karoo Game Reserve in the Eastern Cape is situated 55 km outside the charming and historic Graaff-Reinet, the fourth oldest town in South Africa."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This game reserve recently informed Graaff-Reinet Advertiser that Sibella’s Legacy is a testament to cheetah conservation, as she was the first wild cheetah to return to the Great Karoo in over 130 years in 2004."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sibella was rescued from a dog attack in the North West Province and taken to the De Wildt Cheetah and Wildlife Centre for treatment and rehabilitation.","html":"Sibella was rescued from a dog attack in the North West Province and taken to the De Wildt Cheetah and Wildlife Centre for treatment and rehabilitation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In December 2003, she was released onto Samara, becoming the first wild cheetah to inhabit the area since the early 19th century.","html":"In December 2003, she was released onto Samara, becoming the first wild cheetah to inhabit the area since the early 19th century."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sibella turned out to be an incredible mother, raising multiple litters of cubs to adulthood and contributing significantly to the growing cheetah population at Samara.","html":"Sibella turned out to be an incredible mother, raising multiple litters of cubs to adulthood and contributing significantly to the growing cheetah population at Samara."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She left a lasting impact as a symbol of conservation. Her story captured global attention through a National Geographic documentary titled Sibella the Miracle Cheetah, making her a worldwide ambassador for cheetah conservation.","html":"She left a lasting impact as a symbol of conservation. Her story captured global attention through a National Geographic documentary titled Sibella the Miracle Cheetah, making her a worldwide ambassador for cheetah conservation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her legacy continues at Samara, where guests can track wild cheetah on foot, a privilege made possible by her habituation and the success of the conservation programme.","html":"Her legacy continues at Samara, where guests can track wild cheetah on foot, a privilege made possible by her habituation and the success of the conservation programme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is a three-to-four day slackpacking adventure for those who appreciate the delights of a walking safari with a difference.","html":"This is a three-to-four day slackpacking adventure for those who appreciate the delights of a walking safari with a difference."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Sibella’s legacy: Karoo cheetah pioneer inspires global conservation
